name: The Home Savings And Loan Company Of Kenton, Ohio, Dba Hslc
description_short: Community bank in Kenton, Ohio offering residential mortgages, commercial loans, auto financing, and Kasasa checking accounts with cash back rewards.
description_long:
The Home Savings and Loan Company of Kenton, Ohio (HSLC) operates as a traditional community bank headquartered in Kenton, Ohio. The institution serves both personal and business customers through multiple branch locations and has recently upgraded its digital infrastructure with new online and mobile banking platforms for Android and Apple devices.

HSLC offers a comprehensive range of financial products including real estate loans, commercial business loans, auto loans, and Kasasa-branded checking accounts. Their Kasasa checking products feature no monthly maintenance fees and provide cash back rewards on debit card purchases. The bank also provides merchant services supporting mobile payments, check acceptance, and major credit cards, with promotional offerings including 3-year price locks on eligible savings accounts and CDs. Loan applications can be submitted online or in person at branch locations.

The company distinguishes itself through emphasis on personalized customer service and relationship banking. Customer testimonials highlight specific staff members by name (Lance Lawrence, Crystal) and praise the bank's responsiveness to business and personal financial needs. HSLC positions itself as a small community bank with above-average customer service focus, contrasting with larger national institutions.

As a traditional regional bank, HSLC is well-suited for customers seeking relationship-based banking with local decision-making. However, consumers should note the bank operates only in Kenton, Ohio with limited branch locations, which restricts accessibility for non-local customers. The website content does not provide specific information about interest rates, loan terms, credit requirements, or account minimums, requiring direct contact for detailed product specifications. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Real estate/home mortgage loans with online application
Commercial business loans with flexible terms
Kasasa checking accounts with cash back rewards
Savings accounts and CDs with promotional 3-year price locks
Online banking platform with account management
Merchant services including mobile payments and credit card processing
Business banking with cash flow and payment management tools
Debit cards with cash back rewards
pros: Kasasa checking accounts with cash back rewards and no monthly maintenance fees
Online mortgage loan application available for streamlined home purchase process
Personalized service with named loan officers and relationship banking focus
Recently upgraded mobile banking apps for both Android and Apple devices
Merchant services offering 3-year price lock promotion on eligible savings and CDs
Multiple loan product options: mortgages, commercial, and auto loans
User-friendly online banking platform described in customer testimonials
cons: Limited geographic availability restricted to Kenton, Ohio area with no mention of remote account opening
Website lacks transparency on interest rates, APRs, loan terms, and account minimums
No information provided about credit score requirements or lending standards
Limited digital product innovation compared to neobanks—primarily traditional banking products
Loan approval process requires in-person branch visits or limited online options
best_for: Kenton, Ohio residents and local businesses seeking relationship-based community banking
Homebuyers in the region interested in local mortgage lending with personalized service
Small business owners needing commercial loans and merchant services with local decision-making
diagnosis: HSLC is best for Kenton, Ohio-area residents and local business owners prioritizing relationship-based community banking with personalized service over digital innovation. The main caveat is geographic restriction to one Ohio location, making it inaccessible for customers outside the region, combined with lack of transparent pricing information requiring direct contact for specific rates and terms.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
fdic_official_name: The Home Savings and Loan Company of Kenton, Ohio, DBA HSLC
